components.name: Sentinel Button
components.description: The primary call to action. Sturdy and high-contrast.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #64ffda; color: #0a192f; padding: 12px 24px; font-weight: 700; border: none; border-radius: 4px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; transition: background 0.2s; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #4cd8b8; }

components.name: Headland Card
components.css: .ds-card { background: #112240; border: 1px solid rgba(100, 255, 218, 0.1); border-radius: 8px; padding: 24px; color: #ccd6f6; } .ds-card h3 { color: #64ffda; margin-top: 0; }

narrative.overview: A sturdy, watchful presence along the Australian coast. Rejects the delicate for the dependable. Spacious, clear, and focused on Safe Harbour security.

rules.name: The 10% Beacon Rule
rules.body: Shoreline Teal is used on ≤10% of any screen.

dos: Do use solid background fills for all primary UI containers.
Do maintain high contrast between text and background.
donts: Don't use 'hacker' clichés or neon-on-black schemes.
Don't rely on glassmorphism or high-blur transparency.
